raw_title: A Credible Change: How Parties Use Election Promises to Counteract The Loss of Reputation When They Dilute Their Policy Positions
title_en: A Credible Change: How Parties Use Election Promises to Counteract The Loss of Reputation When They Dilute Their Policy Positions
title_zh: 可信的改变：政党如何利用竞选承诺来抵消政策立场淡化时的声誉损失
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了当政党淡化其政策立场时，如何通过竞选承诺来维护自己的声誉。它解释了政党如何利用具体的承诺来保持选民信任，即使他们的整体政策方向变得不那么明确。
plain_summary_en: This study explores how political parties use election promises to maintain their reputation when they dilute their policy positions. It explains how parties employ specific promises to retain voter trust, even as their overall policy direction becomes less clear.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中政党策略与选民信任的动态关系研究，特别关注声誉管理和政策沟通机制。
research_direction_en: Research on the dynamic relationship between party strategies and voter trust in political communication, with a focus on reputation management and policy communication mechanisms.
